series_metadata.series_description: Original documents of filings, entries, orders and all papers, maps and documents pertaining to each individual case.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete, then transfer to new system. ; Microform: Retain permanently. ; Paper: Retain until scanned and image is checked for quality and completeness, then destroy., Electronic: Other ; Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
